phase.name: [phase-name-with-hyphens]
phase.description: [One sentence: what capability does this phase deliver?]

task.title: [Short imperative title — e.g., "Add product types and service"]
task.description: [Precise description. Include:] - What file(s) to create or modify - What types/interfaces to add to types/index.ts - What API endpoints to call (method + path + payload + response shape) - What the service functions should be named - What NOT to change [Acceptance criteria:] - [ ] File exists at src/services/api/productService.ts - [ ] npm run typecheck passes

task.title: [Short imperative title — e.g., "Create products Redux slice"]
task.description:
[Precise description. Include:] - Slice name, initial state shape - AsyncThunks to implement (name + what service function to call) - Selectors to export - Register in store/index.ts
[Acceptance criteria:] - [ ] Slice file exists at src/store/slices/[resource]Slice.ts - [ ] Slice registered in src/store/index.ts - [ ] npm run typecheck passes

task.title: [Short imperative title — e.g., "Build products hook and page"]
task.description:
[Precise description. Include:] - Hook name and what it exposes (fields + actions) - Page component location and what it renders - Route to register in App.tsx (if new route) - Loading / error / empty states that must be handled
[Acceptance criteria:] - [ ] Hook exists at src/hooks/use[Resource].ts - [ ] Page exists at src/pages/[Resource]/index.tsx - [ ] All three states handled (loading, error, empty) - [ ] npm run typecheck passes

phase.done_criteria: - All tasks marked done - `cd frontend && npm run typecheck` passes with zero errors - `cd frontend && npm run lint` passes with zero errors - All loading / error / empty states handled in UI - No `console.log` left in touched files
